Macro Theme: Range-bound with event risk into CPI

Vendor Summary: Dealers are long gamma near spot with muted realized vol.

Support: 6180

Macro Note Summary: Operators should expect chop between walls until CPI clears.

Skew Commentary: Put skew is elevated versus 30-day median.

SPX: 6225

Implied 1-Day Move: 0.85%
